option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<BorderPane fx:controller="controllers.amateur.EventDetailController" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="event-detail-scroll"> <content> <VBox spacing="18.0" styleClass="event-detail-root"> <padding> <Insets top="12.0" right="12.0" bottom="12.0" left="12.0" /> </padding>
<StackPane minHeight="260.0" styleClass="event-cover-box"> <ImageView fx:id="coverImageView" fitWidth="900.0" fitHeight="260.0" preserveRatio="true" /> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card,event-detail-header-card"> <padding> <Insets top="18.0" right="18.0" bottom="18.0" left="18.0" /> </padding>
<Label fx:id="titleLabel" styleClass="event-title" text="Evenement" wrapText="true" />
<HBox spacing="8.0"> <Label fx:id="typeLabel" styleClass="event-chip event-chip-type" text="Type" /> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" styleClass="event-chip event-chip-status" text="Statut" /> </HBox>
<Label text="Description" styleClass="event-description-title" /> <Label fx:id="descriptionLabel" styleClass="event-description" text="Description" wrapText="true" />
<GridPane hgap="18.0" vgap="8.0"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </columnConstraints> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Horaire debut" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Horaire fin" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Prix" GridPane.columnIndex="2" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Capacite" GridPane.columnIndex="3" GridPane.rowIndex="0" />
<Label fx:id="dateDebutLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" text="-" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="dateFinLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" text="-" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="priceLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value event-price-value" text="-" GridPane.columnIndex="2" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="capacityLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" text="-" GridPane.columnIndex="3" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> </GridPane>
<HBox spacing="8.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="event-location-info"> <Label text="Galerie:" styleClass="event-location-label" /> <Label fx:id="galleryLabel" text="-" /> <Label fx:id="metaLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="-" /> </HBox> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card ticket-section-card"> <padding> <Insets top="14.0" right="14.0" bottom="14.0" left="14.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <Label text="Mes tickets" styleClass="ticket-section-title" /> <Label fx:id="ticketsCountLabel" styleClass="ticket-count-chip" text="0 ticket(s)" /> <StackPane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button fx:id="buyTicketButton" text="Acheter ticket" onAction="#onBuyTicketClick" styleClass="ticket-action-primary" /> <Button fx:id="backButton" text="Retour" onAction="#onBackClick" styleClass="ticket-action-secondary" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="ticketsEmptyLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Aucun ticket achete pour cet evenement." /> <VBox fx:id="ticketsContainer" spacing="8.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" /> </VBox> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.image.ImageView?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.ColumnConstraints?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.StackPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?> <?import javafx.scene.web.WebView?>
<BorderPane fx:controller="controllers.amateur.EventDetailController" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"> <center> <ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="event-detail-scroll"> <content> <VBox spacing="18.0" styleClass="event-detail-root"> <padding> <Insets top="12.0" right="12.0" bottom="12.0" left="12.0" /> </padding>
<StackPane minHeight="260.0" styleClass="event-cover-box"> <ImageView fx:id="coverImageView" fitWidth="900.0" fitHeight="260.0" preserveRatio="true" /> </StackPane>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card event-detail-header-card"> <padding> <Insets top="18.0" right="18.0" bottom="18.0" left="18.0" /> </padding>
<Label fx:id="titleLabel" styleClass="event-title" text="Evenement" wrapText="true" />
<HBox spacing="8.0"> <Label fx:id="typeLabel" styleClass="event-chip event-chip-type" text="Type" /> <Label fx:id="statusLabel" styleClass="event-chip event-chip-status" text="Statut" /> </HBox>
<Label text="Description" styleClass="event-description-title" /> <Label fx:id="descriptionLabel" styleClass="event-description" text="Description" wrapText="true" />
<GridPane hgap="18.0" vgap="8.0"> <columnConstraints> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <ColumnConstraints hgrow="ALWAYS" /> </columnConstraints> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Horaire debut" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Horaire fin" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Prix" GridPane.columnIndex="2" GridPane.rowIndex="0" /> <Label styleClass="event-stat-label" text="Capacite" GridPane.columnIndex="3" GridPane.rowIndex="0" />
<Label fx:id="dateDebutLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" text="-" GridPane.columnIndex="0" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="dateFinLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" text="-" GridPane.columnIndex="1" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="priceLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value event-price-value" text="-" GridPane.columnIndex="2" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> <Label fx:id="capacityLabel" styleClass="event-stat-value" text="-" GridPane.columnIndex="3" GridPane.rowIndex="1" /> </GridPane>
<HBox spacing="8.0" alignment="CENTER_LEFT" styleClass="event-location-info"> <Label text="Galerie:" styleClass="event-location-label" /> <Label fx:id="galleryLabel" text="-" /> <Label fx:id="metaLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="-" /> </HBox> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card ticket-section-card"> <padding> <Insets top="14.0" right="14.0" bottom="14.0" left="14.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="12.0"> <Label text="Mes tickets" styleClass="ticket-section-title" /> <Label fx:id="ticketsCountLabel" styleClass="ticket-count-chip" text="0 ticket(s)" /> <Button fx:id="ticketsToggleButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onToggleTicketsClick" styleClass="ticket-toggle-button" text="Voir plus" visible="false" managed="false" /> <StackPane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Button fx:id="buyTicketButton" text="Acheter ticket" onAction="#onBuyTicketClick" styleClass="ticket-action-primary" /> <Button fx:id="backButton" text="Retour" onAction="#onBackClick" styleClass="ticket-action-secondary" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="ticketsEmptyLabel" styleClass="page-caption" text="Aucun ticket achete pour cet evenement." /> <VBox fx:id="ticketsContainer" spacing="8.0" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="16.0" styleClass="amateur-page-card event-location-card"> <padding> <Insets top="18.0" right="18.0" bottom="18.0" left="18.0" /> </padding>
<Label text="Localisation de l'événement" styleClass="event-location-title" />
<HBox spacing="24.0" alignment="TOP_LEFT"> <VBox spacing="10.0" prefWidth="300.0" minWidth="260.0" maxWidth="340.0"> <VBox spacing="10.0" styleClass="event-location-details-card"> <Label fx:id="galleryNameLabel" text="Galerie" styleClass="event-location-gallery-name" wrapText="true" />
<VBox spacing="3.0"> <Label text="Adresse" styleClass="event-location-field-label" /> <Label fx:id="galleryAddressLabel" text="-" styleClass="event-location-field-value" wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="3.0"> <Label text="Coordonnées" styleClass="event-location-field-label" /> <Label fx:id="galleryCoordinatesLabel" text="-" styleClass="event-location-field-value" wrapText="true" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="3.0"> <Label text="Capacité de la galerie" styleClass="event-location-field-label" /> <Label fx:id="galleryCapacityLabel" text="-" styleClass="event-location-field-value" wrapText="true" /> </VBox> </VBox> </VBox>
<StackPane HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" minHeight="280.0" styleClass="event-map-box"> <WebView fx:id="mapWebView" /> </StackPane> </HBox> </VBox> </VBox> </content> </ScrollPane> </center> </BorderPane>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
